name: Toasted Crab Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 Small green pepper or pimiento, minced
recipeInstructions:
Note: Ingredients in parenthesis are brand names from the sponsors of the radio programs. Many no longer exist.
1. Mix all ingredients together, seasoning to taste and moistening with mayonnaise.
2. Split dinner rolls and spread each with margarine.
3. Spread the crab mixture onto each roll, then add a thin slice of cheese and a strip of bacon on top.
4. Place the rolls in an oven to allow the cheese to soften and the bacon to crisp.
